stock_market.summary: Markets ended March 30 under pressure due to escalating Middle East tensions. DJIA closed 45,216.10, Nasdaq at 20,794.60, S&P 500 at 6,343.72. Persistent inflation fears and oil price surge ($100+/bbl) dominate near-term outlook.

art_market.summary: 2025 Global art market sales reached $59.6 billion (+4%). U.S. leads with 44% market share. High-end segment ($10M+) remains the primary driver. Market sentiment cautious due to geopolitical instability.
